conditionDescriptions: concurrent use with GLP-1 receptor agonist
contraindications.clinicalRationale: GLP-1 receptor agonists and DPP-4 inhibitors both work through the incretin pathway and should not be used together as combination therapy provides no additional benefit and may increase risk of adverse effects
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Practice Point 4.2.3: GLP-1 RA should not be used in combination with a DPP-4 inhibitor.
